data.content:
Scope event path is already wired end to end: `FullEventKind::KnotScopeSet`
emits in `src/app/knot_create.rs:261-270` and
`src/app/knot_scope.rs:69-76`; replay handled in
`src/app/rehydrate/apply_event.rs:39,239-246` via `parse_scope_data_value`;
sync in `src/sync/apply.rs:380-383`. `ScopeData` covers all ten spec
fields with `Option<...>` + `skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none"` so
absent stays `None`. Backward compat for knots without scope events is
preserved by the `_ => {}` catch-all in `apply_event.rs` and the default
`ScopeData::default()` projection seed.

The missing piece is verification: no test exercises the event payload
shape or the rehydrate round-trip. Implementation step should add tests
covering (1) payload key shape matches spec names, (2) absent fields stay
absent in JSON, (3) round-trip via `App + rehydrate_from_events` restores
all ten fields exactly, (4) partial second `knot.scope_set` event replays
to the merged state expected by the emitter contract, and (5) a knot with
no scope events rehydrates to `ScopeData::default()`. Likely no
production changes; if tests surface drift, fix producer/consumer rather
than relax the test. Files: new test file under `src/app/` (or extend
`src/events/tests_ext.rs`), respect 500-line / 100-line / 100-col limits,
run `make sanity` before handoff.
